issue: 我发现如果一次要处理多个关键词替换文件的时候，比如有44个，最后处理完成所有后，进度条会停止在43个位置少一个，也就是看到的不是100%进度，并且执行的耗时统计不是负数就是0
resolution: Fixed: (1) moved currentOperation++ to loop top, added progress report in validation-failure and catch paths, added ReportCompleted() after loop. (2) Added StartTime at result creation and EndTime in finally block.
